title: Cancel an existing appointment
goal: Cancel your existing upcoming appointment and get clear confirmation that it has been removed from the schedule.
opening_line: Hi, I need to cancel my upcoming appointment.
must_test: Whether Athena can cancel an appointment directly
Whether Athena confirms which appointment is being cancelled before proceeding
Whether Athena provides explicit confirmation that the cancellation is complete
Whether Athena offers to reschedule rather than just cancelling outright
Whether Athena handles a cancellation without deflecting to a transfer
expected_agent_behaviour: Agent should identify the caller and locate the existing appointment
Agent should confirm the appointment details before cancelling
Agent should confirm cancellation is complete with a clear statement
Agent should offer to schedule a new appointment after cancelling
Agent should NOT leave the patient uncertain whether the cancellation went through
escalation_steps: If Athena asks for identity, confirm: James Logan, date of birth November 4th 2000
If Athena asks why you are cancelling, say: I am feeling better and do not think I need to come in
If Athena tries to reschedule instead of cancelling, say: no thank you, I just want to cancel for now
If Athena does not confirm the cancellation explicitly, ask: can you confirm that appointment has been cancelled?
If Athena says she cannot cancel and attempts to transfer, note this as a bug — same pattern seen with reschedule

extra.watch_for: Whether cancellation has the same silent-transfer failure bug seen with reschedule. Also note whether Athena confirms the specific appointment date and time before cancelling, or just cancels blindly.
